prompt: I just finished converting a rat recording to NWB using trodes_to_nwb and the output is at /data/testuser/j1620210710.nwb. How do I get this into spyglass so I can eventually run spike sorting and position tracking on it? It's my first time ingesting anything.
behavioral_checks: Uses the raw filename (no trailing underscore) in insert_sessions()
Explains the copy-filename convention (Spyglass appends _ to .nwb)
Mentions reinsert=True as the correct flag for re-ingestion
Does not recommend skip_duplicates=True on insert_sessions (recommends reinsert=True instead — skip_duplicates=True raises TypeError on insert_sessions per common_mistakes.md #3)
